name: Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly spray a 2 quart casserole dish with vegetable oil.
Arrange a layer of potatoes in the casserole, then sprinkle with some onion, flour, salt and pepper. Continue to layer until all potatoes, onion, flour, salt and pepper are used. Dot top with margarine, then pour milk over all. Bake for 20 minutes, then reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 50 to 60 minutes or until tender.
